seoTitle: Goroke vs Goughs Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Goroke and Goughs Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Goroke vs Goughs Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Goroke and Goughs Bay.
heading: Goroke vs Goughs Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Goroke, Victoria and Goughs Bay, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Goroke has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Goughs Bay (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Goroke or Goughs Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Goroke has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Goughs Bay scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Goroke scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Goughs Bay scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Goroke or Goughs Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Goroke has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
